answer: In 2024, Texas state expenditures were categorized into 17 major spending areas, with the highest counts in "Salaries and Wages" (7,685) and "Employee Benefits" (5,811). Separately, Austin recorded 2,770 code violations, with the highest concentrations in ZIP codes 78758 (2,040 violations) and 78741 (1,761 violations). While the datasets provide detailed insights into expenditures by county and violations by ZIP code, they are not directly joined due to differing geographic units.
